lang.label: Language
birth.title: TajNet is born
birth.lead: A sovereign personal node: IPFS storage, Tajcoin (TAJ) micro-payments, Guard access gate, Discover index, and extensible plugins. Your data stays on your machine.
birth.plugins.title: Plugins
birth.plugins.lead: TajNet extends through folders under plugins/. Each plugin ships a manifest.json and optional index.js handlers.
birth.plugins.step1: Create plugins/my-plugin/manifest.json with name, version, active.
birth.plugins.step3: Restart the core — GET /api/plugins lists active plugins.
birth.plugins.bran: This public edition includes Bran Web: modular HTML archives, client editor, IPFS publish (2 TAJ + MetaMask).
birth.plugins.more: Super CV, Matomo analytics, and Futuremen live feed are available in the full operator edition — not in this public tree.
footer.edition: TajNet public edition v1.0 · Plugin: Bran Web
